mnemonics: H.U.D. - Design interfaces that are Helpful, Usable, and Delightful
keyPoints: Focus on user-centered design principles to ensure usability
Employ iterative testing methods like A/B testing and usability studies for evaluation
Balance aesthetic appeal with functional clarity to reduce user cognitive load
commonMistakes: Prioritizing aesthetic design over functional usability
Skipping user testing phases due to time or budget constraints
Designing for the 'average user' instead of considering diverse user needs and abilities
